The Hero Product

Crystal Keeper Top

Natural
Obsidian

The Concept

A discreet pocket.
An intentional practice.

The Crystal Keeper Top integrates a replaceable crystal holder centrally at the chest — invisible from the outside, present in every movement. Designed for the woman who blends performance with ritual, science with intuition.

Developed in collaboration with the Faculty of Design Ljubljana and Center za kreativnost / MAO. Patent pending.
